texto: There are two types of obstacles in life
autor: those we put in our on way to prohibit growth. And those that life puts in our way to promote growth.
explicacao: Citação de those we put in our on way to prohibit growth. And those that life puts in our way to promote growth. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “There are two types of obstacles in life” articula reflexao, glenn-a-maltais, there em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
